text: The conversation is tinged with skepticism and curiosity, as if we are standing before some enigmatic device. I am both amused and a little unsettled by the idea that something here might read my mind. What is it to be observed by a machine, and what messages do we seek or expect from silent objects? The indistinct images only add to the uncertainty, and I find myself pondering not just the limits of technology, but the limits of knowing anything at all.
